description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-select` (T1-08). 6/6 libraries — critical healthcare form control.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-select/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, slotted native `<option>` typing, multi-select support, form value typing
2. Accessibility — combobox pattern if custom, native `<select>` delegation if using it, keyboard (arrow keys, typeahead), `aria-expanded`, `aria-selected`, `aria-activedescendant`, axe-core pass
3. Tests — single/multi select, keyboard navigation, search/filter if present, form association, error state, disabled options
4. Storybook — single/multi, grouped options, searchable variant, error/disabled states
5. CSS — custom dropdown styling, option highlighting, `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle size scrutiny (selects are complex), < 5KB target
7. Drupal — native `<option>` slots work in Twig without JS

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-select/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-select — T1-08 antagonistic quality review
